
### exercise  


* use 2-bit predictor on this loop 

   * executed in outer loop (not shown) many, many times

* what is the conditional branch misprediction rate?
 
```c
int i = 0;
while (true) {
  if (i % 3 == 0) goto next;
  ...
next:
  i += 1;
  if (i == 50) break;
}

```


### exercise soln (1) 

![](/bpred/texfig/2BmispredExSoln.figure.svg)
